case_title: JAMES DE SOTO DBA DE SOTO BAIL BONDS VS SACAPANIO, REYNALDO et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JAMES DE SOTO DBA DE SOTO BAIL BONDS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SACAPANIO, REYNALDO SACAPANIO, MARIA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $565.00, JUDGMENT OF $500.00 REPRESENTS BOND, WHICH WAS EXONERATED.
